elements.original_description: A close-up of a person's hand typing on a laptop keyboard, with a bank login page displayed on the screen. The screen shows a username and password field, with soft blue and white tones. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph, cinematic lighting, sharp focus, a close-up of a person's hand typing on a laptop keyboard, with a bank login page displayed on the screen. The screen shows a username and password field, with soft blue and white tones. Professional and clean composition, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.original_description: A simplified illustration of a bank building with a vault door slightly ajar, glowing gold light spilling out. The building has a modern design with glass windows and a blue logo above the entrance. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon, simplified illustration of a bank building with a vault door slightly ajar, glowing gold light spilling out. The building has a modern design with glass windows and a blue logo above the entrance. Pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading/gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
